ddls:
CREATE TABLE "footwear_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each footwear model */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the footwear model */,
  "layer" TEXT /* Layer the footwear is categorized under (e.g., Feet) */,
  "blunt_resistance" REAL /* Blunt resistance rating */,
  "sharp_resistance" REAL /* Sharp resistance rating */,
  "heat_resistance" REAL /* Heat resistance rating */,
  "electric_resistance" REAL /* Electric resistance rating */,
  "heat_insulation" INTEGER /* Heat insulation rating */,
  "cold_insulation" INTEGER /* Cold insulation rating */,
  "carry_bonus" REAL /* Carry bonus rating */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the model */,
  "product_line_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the product line */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the primary material */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the footwear model */,
  "size_range" TEXT /* Range of sizes available for the model */,
  "color_options" TEXT /* Color options available for the model */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Certifications and compliance standards the model meets */,
  "warranty_period" TEXT /* Warranty period for the model */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the model was added to the system */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the model was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_footwear_models_product_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_line_id") REFERENCES product_lines ("line_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_footwear_models_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "materials" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material */,
  "material_name" TEXT /* Name of the material used in footwear */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the material */,
  "density" REAL /* Density of the material */,
  "cost_per_unit" REAL /* Cost per unit of the material */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the primary supplier */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the material was added to the system */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the material was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_materials_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_lines" (
  "line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product line */,
  "line_name" TEXT /* Name of the product line */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product line */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the product line was added to the system */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the product line was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the inventory record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the footwear model */,
  "quantity_available" INTEGER /* Quantity of the footwear model available in stock */,
  "warehouse_location" TEXT /* Location of the warehouse where the footwear is stored */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Level at which inventory should be reordered */,
  "last_stock_check" TEXT /* Date of the last stock check */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the inventory record was added to the system */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the inventory record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES footwear_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale transaction */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the footwear model */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity of the footwear model sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the footwear model at the time of sale */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the customer */,
  "order_number" TEXT /* Order number for the sale */,
  "sales_person_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the salesperson */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the sale record was added to the system */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the sale record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_sales_person_id FOREIGN KEY ("sales_person_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES footwear_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the footwear model */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given to the footwear model */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or feedback provided by the user */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when feedback was submitted */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the customer */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the feedback record was added to the system */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the feedback record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES footwear_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the organization (e.g., admin, manager, staff) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the user was added to the system */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the user record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the role was added to the system */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the role was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the footwear model */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the footwear model */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was released */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the version record was added to the system */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the version record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES footwear_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the supplier was added to the system */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the supplier record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "material_suppliers" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link record */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the materials table */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the suppliers table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_material_suppliers_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_material_suppliers_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id")
)
